title: luzula parviflora var. fastigiata
intro: Luzula parviflora var. fastigiata, also known as the tufted woodrush, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Luzula parviflora var. fastigiata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or tincture to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
